name: SongCounter
author: NeptuneHub
description: Counts analyzed songs as a bar chart, and uses the on_song_analyzed worker hook to show a per-run count of songs analyzed plus the full hook payload of the last analyzed song.

versions.changelog: Add the index_log cron task: an hourly snapshot of the Musicnn, DCLAP and GTE index sizes, kept to the last 10 rows and shown on the page. Ships disabled; enable it in Scheduled Tasks.
Render dict fields of the last-song detail (like analysis.moods) one entry per line with rounded values, so long fields wrap instead of overflowing the page.
Fix the last-song detail table overflowing the page: fixed table layout with a pinned key column and wrapping values.
